name: asciinema
description: Browse GitHub PR build artifacts in VS Code — play asciinema casts, preview Astro & static-site builds, and explore extracted files, with live download progress, recents, and a per-cast player settings cog.

asciinema.maxArtifactSizeMB.description: Maximum compressed size (in MB) of a workflow artifact that the GitHub Artifacts Explorer command will download without prompting. Larger selections are still allowed after a confirmation dialog.

asciinema.maxArtifactExtractedMB.description: Maximum total uncompressed size (in MB) of artifact contents written to disk during extraction.

asciinema.maxArtifactEntryCount.description: Maximum number of files allowed inside a downloaded artifact zip. Protects against zip-bomb-style archives.

asciinema.maxArtifactEntrySizeMB.description: Maximum uncompressed size (in MB) of any single file inside an artifact zip.

asciinema.player.autoPlay.description: Start playback automatically when a .cast file opens. Equivalent to the asciinema player `autoPlay` option.

asciinema.player.preload.description: Preload the recording when the player initializes (asciinema `preload` option).

asciinema.player.loop.description: Loop playback. `true` for infinite loop, a number to loop that many times, `false` for no looping (asciinema `loop` option).

asciinema.player.startAt.description: Time to start playback at. Number of seconds, or `mm:ss` / `hh:mm:ss` (asciinema `startAt` option).

asciinema.player.speed.description: Playback speed (`2` means 2x). Defaults to 1 (asciinema `speed` option).

asciinema.player.idleTimeLimit.description: Compress inactivity longer than N seconds. `null` to use the cast file's recorded value (asciinema `idleTimeLimit` option).

asciinema.player.pauseOnMarkers.description: Pause playback at every marker (asciinema `pauseOnMarkers` option).

asciinema.player.theme.description: Terminal color theme. `auto` lets the extension pick based on your VS Code light/dark theme.

asciinema.player.fit.description: Player sizing behavior relative to the editor pane (asciinema `fit` option). `none` uses a fixed font size.

asciinema.player.controls.description: Show/hide the bottom control bar (asciinema `controls` option).

asciinema.player.terminalFontSize.description: Terminal font size: `small`, `medium`, `big`, or any CSS font-size (e.g. `15px`). Only effective when `fit` is `none`.

asciinema.player.terminalFontFamily.description: Terminal font-family (any valid CSS font-family value).

asciinema.player.terminalLineHeight.description: Terminal line height, relative to the font size (asciinema `terminalLineHeight` option).

asciinema.player.poster.description: Poster (preview frame) shown before playback. `npt:1:23` to show a frame at 1m23s, or `data:text/plain,...` for arbitrary text (asciinema `poster` option).
